use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) WITH EPIDERMAL GROWTH FACTOR RECEPTOR (EGFR) EXON 20 EXON INSERTION MUTATIONS WHOSE DISEASE HAS PROGRESSED ON OR AFTER PLATINUM-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY

indications.text:
EXKIVITY is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic non-
small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) exon 20 insertion
mutations, as detected by an FDA-approved test [see Dosage and Administration (2.1)], whose
